Sage Bot Item Code: A179
Horn of Terror

Triggers: Once in a while

Deadly Sound
The horn's sound waves make 1 to 4 enemy units run in panic for 1,6 sec. Each of the remaining enemy units takes 0 to 24000 damage.

Requirements: 90-100
